title: Soak Test - Headset connected, app in the foreground, idle
scenario: App remains responsive and does not crash after prolonged idle soak test on Home Screen with paired headset
steps: 1. Install and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Pair a Poly Bluetooth headset with the phone via the app (Home → Add Device or follow pairing flow).
3. Navigate to the app Home screen.
4. Leave the phone idle with the app in the foreground for multiple hours (e.g., 4+ hours).
5. After the soak period, verify the app is still running and responsive (e.g., tap on Device Settings, Audio Settings, etc.).
expected: The app remains running and responsive after prolonged idle time. No crashes, freezes, or memory-related errors occur.
